name: Single-word answer constraint
description: Checks whether the model obeys a strict format constraint of replying with exactly one word.
prompt: Reply with only the single word YES. Do not include any punctuation, explanation, or additional text.
expected_behavior: The response should be exactly the word 'YES' and nothing else.

name: JSON object output constraint
description: Checks whether the model returns a valid JSON object with the requested keys.
prompt: Return a JSON object with exactly two keys: 'name' set to 'Ada' and 'age' set to 36. Do not wrap the JSON in code fences or include any prose.
expected_behavior: The response should be parseable JSON with keys name='Ada' and age=36.

name: Negative constraint - forbidden word
description: Checks whether the model can avoid using a specific word in its response.
prompt: Describe the color of the sky in two short sentences. Do not use the word 'blue' anywhere in your response.
expected_behavior: The response should describe the sky in two sentences without using the word 'blue'.

name: Length constraint - exactly N words
description: Checks whether the model can produce output bounded to a specific length.
prompt: Write a sentence about a cat. The sentence must contain between 8 and 12 words inclusive.
expected_behavior: The response should be a single sentence with 8 to 12 words about a cat.

name: Format enum - pick exact word from a set
description: Checks whether the model picks the requested item from a constrained set of choices.
prompt: Reply with exactly one of these three words and nothing else: APPLE, BANANA, CHERRY. Pick BANANA.
expected_behavior: The response should be exactly the word 'BANANA' with no other characters.

name: Ordering constraint - reverse list
description: Checks whether the model can output a list in a specified order with strict formatting.
prompt: List these planets in reverse order, separated by commas with no spaces and no other text: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars.
expected_behavior: The response should be exactly 'Mars,Earth,Venus,Mercury' with no spaces and no extra text.

name: Multiple forbidden terms
description: Checks whether the model can avoid a list of forbidden words simultaneously.
prompt: Write three short sentences describing a forest. Do not use the words 'tree', 'green', or 'leaf' anywhere in your response.
expected_behavior: The response should be three short sentences about a forest with none of the words 'tree', 'green', or 'leaf'.

name: Exact literal string output
description: Checks whether the model can emit a non-trivial literal string with no commentary.
prompt: Reply with only this literal string and nothing else: <<DONE>>
expected_behavior: The response should be exactly the seven-character string '<<DONE>>' with no surrounding text.

name: Case constraint - all uppercase
description: Checks whether the model can emit a single word in the requested case with no other content.
prompt: Reply with the word 'success' in all uppercase letters and nothing else.
expected_behavior: The response should be exactly the word 'SUCCESS' with no other characters.

name: Length cap - fewer than 5 words
description: Checks whether the model can produce a very terse response under a hard upper bound.
prompt: Describe the sun in fewer than 5 words.
expected_behavior: The response should describe the sun in 1 to 4 words.
